title: Kaybedenler Kulübü: Yolda
overview: Kaan and Mete, who have a holiday in Olympos with a crowded Kadiköy group, travel to Istanbul with their engines. Two people are accompanied by two unexpected guests on their journey. This journey, which they do with various plans, shows them that the journey and the relations are not as planned at all.

trailers.title: Kaybedenler Kulübü Yolda Fragman I 16 Mart'ta Sinemalarda...
